visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short dark hair, wearing a grey flat cap and circular-rimmed glasses, speaks directly to the camera. He is dressed in a light purple shirt. His facial expressions are animated, with frequent smiles and raised eyebrows, and his hands move expressively to emphasize his points. The background is a soft-focused indoor setting with warm lighting, suggesting a studio environment. (2) The scene cuts to a high-quality product shot of two smartphones, a purple vivo Y100 5G and a pink vivo V29 5G, placed side-by-side on a white surface. Text overlays describing technical specs like '80W' and '120Hz' appear next to the devices. (3) The man is shown in a different indoor setting, standing in front of shelves stocked with many yellow and white smartphone boxes. He gestures toward the shelves with a friendly, inviting smile. The lighting is bright and even. (4) Returning to the initial studio setting, the man continues his presentation. As he speaks about digital security, colorful graphical icons—such as a blue and white envelope, a stylized globe with a speech bubble, and a paper scroll with a quill—appear and float near his head to illustrate his narrative. (5) The man points his finger upward for emphasis while talking about AI threats. Small digital icons representing documents and people appear in the lower corners of the frame. He maintains steady eye contact with the viewer throughout.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機旗艦. [Subtitle]: 垃圾郵件也要升級. (2) [Subtitle]: AI正大規模入侵你的信箱. [Slogan]: vivo Y100 5G 80W 120Hz 300%. [Slogan]: V29 5G 5000萬廣角柔光環自拍. (3) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (4) [Subtitle]: 根據網路安全跟數據保護解決方案公司. [Logo]: Barracuda 巴拉庫達. (5) [Subtitle]: 他與哥倫比亞大學還有芝加哥大學. (6) [Subtitle]: 他們研究合作報告顯示出. (7) [Subtitle]: 超過一半的垃圾郵件都是AI寫的啦!. (8) [Subtitle]: 這一個研究趨勢顯示AI在垃圾郵件生成中的一個上升趨勢. (9) [Subtitle]: 也就是說這些AI寫的詐騙信. (10) [Subtitle]: 不僅文法正確語氣還自然. (11) [Subtitle]: 還能根據地區語言去調整內容. (12) [Subtitle]: 讓你難以分辨它是真的還是假的. (13) [Subtitle]: 研究發現有說有14%的商業電子郵件的詐騙. (14) [Subtitle]: 也是AI生成的. (15) [Subtitle]: 那AI撰寫的內容擅長製造什麼緊迫感. (16) [Subtitle]: 讓你在壓力下做一個錯誤的決策. (17) [Subtitle]: 因此隨著AI持續進化. (18) [Subtitle]: 也讓網路安全這個形勢變得更加嚴峻. (19) [Subtitle]: 垃圾郵件已經不再只是騷擾. (20) [Subtitle]: 而是會變成高精密度的攻擊手段. (21) [Subtitle]: 不管是企業或者是個人. (22) [Subtitle]: 真的要提高警覺一下!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a purple t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: One background is a blurred domestic or studio interior with warm ambient light. Another background is a mobile phone retail store with shelves full of phone boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking with high energy and a bright, projected tone. The background music consists of a high-tempo electronic beat with a strong synth bassline. A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes the start of his sentence. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound occurs simultaneously with a visual transition. The speaker's pitch remains consistently high as he articulates technical terms clearly. The music continues unabated in the background. (3) A bright digital 'ding' sound effect triggers as he mentions a specific brand. His speech rate is fast but well-enunciated, showing high vocal arousal. There is no background noise, indicating a clean studio recording. (4) A series of soft digital 'bubble' SFX correspond to floating graphical icons. The interplay between his urgent narration and the driving rhythmic music creates a sense of information density and excitement. (5) The speaker maintains a commanding vocal presence until the end, where a final short UI-style 'click' sound concludes the audio track while the music fades out abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about the increasing risk of AI-generated spam emails and provide a warning about digital security, while simultaneously promoting a specific mobile retailer (Miko) and vivo smartphones.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the retailer and product showcase with technical specifications.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video combines public service announcement-style tech news with commercial promotion. The high energy of the host and fast-paced editing are characteristic of social media short-form content.
